title: Implement damage post-processor chain (DamageHandler + registerDamageHandler + chain execution)

reference_files.reason: Damage post-processor - registerDamageHandler API, chain execution in registration order, previous return feeds next, final value applied to target
onHit hook timing - damage already applied before onHit, damage handler chain decides final value before application

acceptance_criteria: DamageHandler functional interface created: double processDamage(BulletRecord bullet, Entity target, double damage)
DamageHandlerRegistry maintains List<DamageHandler> in registration order
processChain(BulletRecord bullet, Entity target, double baseDamage) method executes all handlers in order, each handler's return value feeds next handler's input
Final returned value is the damage amount passed to DamageApplier.applyDamage()
If no handlers registered, baseDamage passes through unchanged
Chain executes BEFORE damage application (before hurt() call), onHit hook executes AFTER (handled in subtask 14)
